extensionName.description: The display name of the extension

extensionDescription.message: Select any word for instant definitions. Ctrl+K to summarize any page.

autoDefinitionsHint.message: Double-click a word to see its meaning

aiEngine.description: Collapsible panel header for AI config

testConnection.description: Button to test AI API connection

configNote.message: Without a key, summaries use local extraction.

theme.description: Label for theme selector (applies to popup chrome and in-page overlay)

summaryStyle.description: Label for summary style selector (bullets vs prose)

disabledSitesNote.message: One hostname per line. Matches subdomains (slack.com silences app.slack.com).
disabledSitesNote.description: Helper text for the disabled-sites list

contextMenuDefine.description: Right-click context menu item for definitions

testing.description: Shown on the Test connection button while a test is in progress

timedOut.description: Shown on the Test connection button when the network request times out

invalidUrl.message: Must be a valid HTTP(S) URL

showApiKey.description: Accessible label for the show-password toggle on the API key field

hideApiKey.description: Accessible label for the hide-password toggle on the API key field

cantSummarizeUrl.description: Inline error when the hero Summarize button is clicked on a restricted URL (chrome://, etc.)

refreshAndRetry.description: Inline error when the hero Summarize button is clicked but the content script isn't reachable on the active tab
